name: WEX Fleet Card & Payments API
what_it_does: WEX REST API for fleet card, corporate payments, and benefits payments platform. Enables AI agents to manage fleet card issuance and transaction management, handle fuel purchase tracking and analytics, access vehicle and driver management data, retrieve fleet expense reporting and tax data, manage IFTA fuel tax reporting, handle corporate payment card management, access healthcare benefits payment data (FSA/HSA), retrieve payment analytics and spend reporting, manage merchant acceptance and authorization, and integrate fleet and payment data with accounting and fleet management systems.
use_cases: Managing fleet card transactions and fuel spending from fleet management automation agents
Accessing IFTA fuel tax reporting from compliance automation agents
Retrieving fleet expense analytics from cost management agents
Integrating fleet card data with accounting from financial automation agents
not_for: Consumer credit cards without fleet and corporate payments focus
Non-fleet businesses without vehicle fuel and mileage tracking needs
Simple expense management without fleet card and fuel management
best_when: A fleet operator, logistics company, or corporation using WEX fleet cards wants AI agents to automate fleet card management, fuel transaction tracking, IFTA reporting, expense management, and accounting integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Fleet card transactions are real payment card transactions — PCI-DSS scope. Automated card controls must prevent fraud. IFTA fuel tax automation must accurately calculate tax liability by state. Employee fleet card data includes personal location and purchase information.

auth.notes: WEX uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Account-level credentials with fleet, payments, and benefits scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for transaction events. Multi-product platform: fleet cards, corporate payments, and healthcare benefits. Strong enterprise fleet and corporate payment integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — fleet card and payment transaction pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Transaction-based and program fees; enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Portland, Maine. NYSE: WEX. Founded 1983. Major fleet card and corporate payments platform. $2.5B+ annual revenue. 19M+ vehicles managed. Serves 540,000+ businesses. Expanded from fleet cards to corporate payments and healthcare benefits (FSA/HSA). Acquired Novistone, EFS Transportation, and GoFuel. Competes with Comdata and Voyager for fleet cards.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Fleet card transactions are real payment transactions — PCI-DSS scope applies
IFTA fuel tax automation must accurately calculate by state — errors create tax liability
No public MCP server — well-documented OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Healthcare benefits payments (FSA/HSA) are separate product with additional HIPAA considerations
Fleet card fraud controls — automated card limit changes must prevent misuse
Employee location tracking from fleet card purchases — privacy notice required
agent_readiness.security_notes: Fleet card payment and transaction data. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US data residency. Payment fraud controls.

security_score_components.security_notes: Fleet payment data. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US data residency. IFTA tax compliance.
